seo.title: Thank You — Presto
seo.description: You're in. Thanks for subscribing to Presto — here's what happens next.

hero.subline: We're genuinely excited to work with you. Your creative partnership starts now.

steps.title: Check your inbox
steps.description: We'll be in touch within 24 hours with your client dashboard and information pack — everything you need to hit the ground running.

steps.title: Onboard and align
steps.description: We'll set up your Presto workspace and run a focused discovery session to understand your brand, goals, and what to tackle first.

steps.title: Submit, review, ship
steps.description: Your queue is open. Start submitting requests and we'll begin delivering — async, no hand-holding required.

cta.label: Any questions?
cta.text: Reach us anytime at hello@heypresto.design — we typically reply same business day.
